_description: Target companies for direct ATS board polling. Primary discovery source — preferred over WebSearch because ATS JSON endpoints return structured, fresh, deduplicated data with no 403/JS issues.

_websearch_sources.description: Supplemental discovery sources run via WebSearch each daily pipeline run. Use these to find companies NOT on the ATS watchlist, especially Atlanta startups.

sources.name: Hypepotamus Job Board
sources.disabled_reason: Job listings are JavaScript-rendered via nonce-protected AJAX. Direct WebFetch returns empty shell; WP REST API endpoints for listings are not public. Cannot be polled headlessly without a browser dependency. Tested 2026-05-08.

sources.name: BuiltIn Atlanta
sources.query: site:builtin.com/job "support operations" OR "technical account" OR "implementation manager" OR "customer operations" OR "deployment manager" Atlanta
sources.notes: Atlanta tech companies, mid-size focus. Atlanta small company bonus (+20) applies for HQ Atlanta headcount ≤200.

sources.name: BuiltIn Remote
sources.query: site:builtin.com/job "support operations" OR "technical account" OR "implementation manager" OR "customer operations" OR "deployment manager" remote
sources.notes: Remote roles from tech companies nationally. No Atlanta bonus — needs stronger title/keyword fit to clear threshold. Salary floor ($100K) still applies.

sources.name: Wellfound Startups
sources.query: site:wellfound.com support operations OR technical account manager OR implementation manager OR deployment OR customer operations startup remote OR Atlanta
sources.notes: Formerly AngelList. Early-stage startups nationally (Series A/B focus). Atlanta HQ companies still get +20 bonus. Remote roles score on fit alone. Skews equity-heavy — verify salary floor before tailoring. Skip pre-seed if comp not listed.

sources.name: AI-Titled Roles (Broad Discovery)
sources.query: ("AI Success Manager" OR "AI Outcomes Manager" OR "AI Adoption" OR "AI Transformation Lead" OR "AI Value Partner" OR "AI Engagement Lead" OR "AI Delivery Manager" OR "AI GTM") jobs remote 2026
sources.notes: Catch-all WebSearch for novel AI-prefixed role titles that don't match named tiers. Companies are still coining these. Run every pipeline pass. Apply AI/LLM bonus (+20) to any hits. Check for salary floor before surfacing. Score against tier2b_ai_wildcard (+18) if no higher tier matches.
sources.scoring_notes: Apply +20 AI bonus + tier2b_ai_wildcard title match (+18) = strong signal. Verify salary floor.

_scoring_config.notes_near_miss: Near-misses are listed (with links) in the email digest but NOT tailored, so Aneesh can eyeball them. Two kinds, unioned: (A) score near-miss — passes all hard filters incl. salary, but scores below light_tailoring_threshold (no lower score bound, capture all). (B) salary near-miss — passes all other filters but salary midpoint is below salary_floor_usd yet at or above near_miss_salary_floor_usd. See SKILL Step 2 + Step 5.
_scoring_config.notes_salary: Compare the MIDPOINT of a listed base-salary range against salary_floor_usd — never the bottom or top. Single figure: use as-is. OTE-only: estimate base (80% for variable/sales roles, 100% otherwise). No salary listed: do not filter, treat as neutral in scoring. See SKILL Step 2b for the authoritative rule.
_scoring_config.notes_freshness: Add +10 for postings ≤2 days old, +2 for ≤7 days. Validated by empirical data: response rates fall sharply after 48 hours.
_scoring_config.notes: Light tailoring for IC-level roles 78-87. Full tailoring for 88+. Skip below 78. Capped companies require 110+ regardless of tier. Cap rule: count entries where applied=true AND outcome=null (pending applications). If that count ≥ company_cap_max_applied_pending, new roles need company_cap_threshold to surface. Queued/unapplied roles do NOT count toward the cap — only submitted applications do.

_title_scoring_tiers.description: Aneesh's background is Technical Support Operations Manager — he runs a support function end-to-end: hiring/training agents, AI deployment, knowledge base, Salesforce administration, QA auditing, BPO management. Score title match accordingly. Operations-first and implementation-first roles are true matches; pure relationship CSM is a stretch.

tier3_reasonable_stretch.notes: CSM roles are structurally different (account/relationship ownership vs. operations leadership) but viable when the JD emphasizes technical depth, deployment, or team management.

tier4_weak_stretch.notes: Only worth surfacing if AI bonus, Atlanta bonus, or salary pushes score above 78 threshold.

tier2b_ai_wildcard.description: Catch-all for novel AI-prefixed roles companies are coining in 2025-2026. Apply when a title is NOT matched by tier1 or tier2 BUT satisfies: (1) 'AI' appears as a word-boundary token, AND (2) title contains ANY of: customer, deployment, implementation, engagement, outcomes, adoption, success, transformation, strategy, value, delivery, operations, solutions. Score as +18 (between T2 +22 and T3 +15). Flag for manual review in email digest. Do NOT apply to 'AI Engineer' or 'AI Architect' titles (those are IC/coding roles).
